name: Account
description: Bank accounts, investment accounts, loan accounts, or general ledger accounts
label: Account

name: Claim
description: Insurance claims, loss events, or reimbursement requests
label: Claim

name: Compliance
description: Regulatory filings, KYC records, AML alerts, or sanctions screening
label: Compliance

name: Counterparty
description: Trading counterparties, custodians, or correspondent banks
label: Counterparty

name: Document
description: Unstructured content, notes, files, or text records
label: Document

name: Event
description: Activities, logs, sessions, audits, or system events
label: Event

name: Instrument
description: Financial instruments -- equities, bonds, derivatives, currencies
label: Instrument

name: Loan
description: Loans, mortgages, credit facilities, or lending agreements
label: Loan

name: Location
description: Addresses, sites, regions, facilities, or geographies
label: Location

name: Metric
description: KPIs, aggregates, facts, summaries, or analytic measures
label: Metric

name: Organization
description: Companies, departments, facilities, or business units
label: Organization

name: Person
description: People, customers, contacts, users, or employees
label: Person

name: Policy
description: Insurance policies, coverage terms, or underwriting records
label: Policy

name: Portfolio
description: Investment portfolios, fund holdings, or asset allocations
label: Portfolio

name: Product
description: Goods, services, SKUs, or catalog items
label: Product

name: Reference
description: Lookup tables, codes, categories, dimensions, or configuration
label: Reference

name: Risk
description: Risk exposures, limits, VaR, stress tests, or credit scores
label: Risk

name: Trade
description: Securities trades, FX transactions, or market orders
label: Trade

name: Transaction
description: Orders, purchases, payments, invoices, or financial events
label: Transaction
